name: CubeAPM
description: Cloud-native observability platform with predictable pricing, unified APM, logs, and Kubernetes monitoring.

seo.title: CubeAPM — Performance Monitoring / APM
seo.meta_description: CubeAPM: Cloud-native observability platform with predictable pricing, unified APM, logs, and Kubernetes monitoring.

when_to_use: Unified APM, logs, and Kubernetes monitoring in one tool
Predictable pricing with no per-host or per-seat fees
Distributed tracing for microservice latency analysis
Kubernetes pod and node resource dashboards

pros: Predictable, usage-based pricing unlike New Relic
Unified APM, logs, and Kubernetes in one place
cons: Younger player vs Datadog or Dynatrace
Ecosystem of integrations still catching up
Community and content library are smaller
review.verdict: Worth a serious look for teams fed up with Datadog bills; mature stacks may miss incumbents' breadth.
review.best_for: Kubernetes-heavy teams seeking APM and logs at predictable cost
review.not_for: Large enterprises needing the deepest integration ecosystem
